review_content.Placements: Rural medical officer, junior medical officer, junior resident, product manager, drug inspector, researcher, lecturer, ayurvedic consultant, and ayurvedic practitioner are some of the roles available. Companies like Patanjali and Himalaya, along with the Government of Odisha provide good jobs with pretty hefty packages.

Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options are available at decent prices.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides the best ayurvedic medical facilities in Odisha.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% students got placed in our course. The highest package salary package offered was 12 LPA. The average salary package offered was 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are the Himalayas, Dabur, and Patanjali. Almost 100% of students got internships in various top companies. The top role offered was MD in Panchakarma.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is placed in an urban area. Our college provides us hostel facility with well-established modern apartments for boys and girls. Our college has different departments with various modern medical equipment. Our college has various department staff and well-skilled professionals. Classrooms are in good condition. Wi-Fi is enabled in our college. The library and departmental labs are available for students. The canteen is available for students. The food served in the hostel is good. A playground is available for sports and indoor games.

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Genesis Institute of Dental Sciences and Research goes up to 116. Courses offerred by Genesis Institute of Dental Sciences and Research are approved by eminent Government bodies such as DCI.
faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Genesis Institute of Dental Sciences and Research for all courses together?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Genesis Institute of Dental Sciences and Research is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as BDS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MDS. The fee structure for the Genesis Institute of Dental Sciences and Research programmes is around INR 6,60,000 to 17,55,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Truth about Genesis Dental College.

review_content.Placements: There are no active placements in this college. But we do have a good internship program in the college, which is also necessary for graduating with your degree. You can always go for MS studies or work under a doctor for gain experience. Otherwise, you can join as a staff member in the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Great teaching facility, supportive, helpful, and really very great overall. Management faculty is not so good. The hostel is also great; it has nice rooms, a good warden, and the cleaning staff is very good. Mess is downright trash; quality has degraded over the years. Canteen is also good, a lifesaver, to be honest. Sports is not so good; most of the time the ground is not in good condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with its teachers and infrastructure, but not satisfied because of lack of jobs.

review_content.Placements: Our job is in hospitals so many of them come to our college, and they conduct some sort of exams, based on that, they select students for their jobs. Most of our seniors get jobs. Some get based on their percentage, and some get based on their knowledge and interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library, laboratories, classrooms, and everything are good in this college. Students can get all books related to our subjects, etc. It does not provide a good hostel facility. The canteen facility is also not good, and students cannot get food and necessary things from the canteen. Medical related, sports, and games are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: A good college to study. But management should consider students' complaints.

review_content.Placements: Campus drives are only for pharmacy students. Not for Pharma.D students. Most of Pharma.D students find jobs on their own. Most of them work in hospitals as clinical pharmacists, DMOs, clinical research coordinators, and in the field of pharmacovigilance. Everyone is getting a salary package up to 2.5-3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, and labs are well-equipped with good ambience. There is no hostel facility available in our college for boys. But there is a hostel for girls in Hayath Nagar. Students organise sports for every fest that is celebrated in the college. Sports mostly played are cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, badminton, etc.

review_summary.college_name: KVK College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college placements, which are held in the month of May 2025.

content.Placements: Approximately 97% of students are placed, with an average package ranging from 2.5 to 3.7 LPA. Companies like Hetero, Divis, Dr. Reddy's, and MSN recruit students, mainly for roles in the Analytical Department. Around 90% of placements happen through campus drives, and offer letters are issued within the college itself. The college provides good learning opportunities, helping students gain strong knowledge and skills.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure and a focus on developing strong communication skills, which helps in building perfect pharmacists both within and outside the college. The hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys outside the college, offering good accommodation that is neat and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of KVK College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: A higher percentage of students are selected for good companies. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package was 4-5 LPA. In our college, some good companies have recruited students. Internships are provided by the college, and industrial visits should be arranged by the college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, studying was very good and the faculty was good. The faculty should take care of students. The lab facilities in the college were good, with all the instruments available. Classes should be kept clean, and the library facility should be good.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its teachers and infrastructure, but not satisfied because of lack of jobs.

content.Placements: Our job is in hospitals so many of them come to our college, and they conduct some sort of exams, based on that, they select students for their jobs. Most of our seniors get jobs. Some get based on their percentage, and some get based on their knowledge and interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Library, laboratories, classrooms, and everything are good in this college. Students can get all books related to our subjects, etc. It does not provide a good hostel facility. The canteen facility is also not good, and students cannot get food and necessary things from the canteen. Medical related, sports, and games are good.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A good college to study. But management should consider students' complaints.

content.Placements: Campus drives are only for pharmacy students. Not for Pharma.D students. Most of Pharma.D students find jobs on their own. Most of them work in hospitals as clinical pharmacists, DMOs, clinical research coordinators, and in the field of pharmacovigilance. Everyone is getting a salary package up to 2.5-3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, and labs are well-equipped with good ambience. There is no hostel facility available in our college for boys. But there is a hostel for girls in Hayath Nagar. Students organise sports for every fest that is celebrated in the college. Sports mostly played are cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, badminton, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Hyderabad for pharmacy courses.

content.Placements: Above 80% of the students got placed from our college. The highest salary offered was Rs. 2,00,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 45,000 per month. The top recruiting companies of our college were pharma companies. Roles of a clinical pharmacist, DMO, and drug analysts, are offered. The highest salary of Rs. 2,00,000 per month was offered in our course by pharma companies. It is a 6 years course; pharma companies offered internships in Hyderabad.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is enabled with free Wi-Fi facility. Labs with all the facilities are available. The college library consists of all kinds of books. Quality of education is very good, and sometimes, the food served is also good. The food served in the canteen is average.

paragraphs: KVK College of Pharmacy admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, KVK College of Pharmacy considers scores in GPAT, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET for admission to specific courses.KVK College of Pharmacyoffers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,72,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 2,20,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.

review_summary.college_name: CU Kerala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: If you're looking for the best university for M.A. economics, then I suggest this.

content.Placements: Our university offered a great placement opportunity. Many students secured positions at different reputed companies. The highest package was 30 LPA. Companies like the World Bank, Deloitte, Accenture and many big companies frequently hire students. Also, many students were offered an internship programme from some companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college provided a broad infrastructure. Properly maintained classroom, labs with many modern equipments, clean washrooms and a library, all facilities available for students. Many different sports and clubs are organised for students' fun. Canteen food is so delicious.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best University for M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.

content.Placements: Almost every student was admitted to a class. 13 LPA is the average salary, while 26 LPA is the highest. A minimum salary of 5 LPA is required. ICICI Bank, American Express, and JP Morgan, among other reputed recruitment firms, visited our campus and offered top jobs like Quantitative Analyst, Actuary, etc. Almost 83 percent of students are able to find employment.
content.Infrastructure: Particularly in terms of diversity, the infrastructure is far from sufficient. The doors at our college are still improperly sized and poorly maintained. The campus area is lovely, but not enough people use it. The majority of the campus is surrounded by trees, giving it the appearance of a woodland environment. The structures are outdated and require maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Student centric teachers.

content.Placements: College makes students get connected with pass out batches to discuss about the company recruitment and skills to be developed in future. Most of the companies for our branches would be core sectors, and the placement team would be built with an independent entrepreneurship cell. The overall placement success of college is 85.3% in 2025.
content.Infrastructure: Central University of Kerala offers more than 50 courses which is incredible. It has separate hostel facilities for male and female candidates with all the essential amenities. They also recommend some of PG if candidates are not comfortable with hostel accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall best university for M.Sc. in Physics course.

content.Placements: This institute offers its students the best opportunities for mobility. Approximately 85% of the students get placement in our college. The average package offered in our programme ranges from 7 to 13 LPA. Reputed companies like NTPC, IOCL, ONGC, etc., acted as contractors in this study. Top roles were Research Scientist, Data Scientist, etc. About 80% of students got their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Amenities at our college were highly rated. Air conditioning and microphones were provided if the instructors were unable to hear. Fast Wi-Fi was consistently available, and the classrooms were cozy. The resources in the library were quite remarkable, they effectively utilize technology and offer extensive practical insights.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, best college for M.Com course.

content.Placements: For adults, my college was a great place to learn. To get employed by a respectable company, you must meet their requirements. Almost 70% of students who earned an average salary of Rs. 25 LPA were able to get home. The most costly package on the market was Rs. 35 LPA. Among the firms present to take on the project were Tata Steel, Axis Bank, and Kotak Mahindra Bank.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was situated on 50 acres of land. The university was the only college in Kerala with a huge auditorium and a fully equipped laboratory for computer and public use. The dormitory for girls was located outside the school, while the hostel for boys was located inside. Additionally, there was a football and cricket field.

admission_process.title: Central University of  Kerala Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Candidates must follow the admission process to get into Central University's courses.CUK admission processincludes multiple steps such asCUET,CUK Application Process,CUET Counselling, CUKSeat allotment, andCUK Fee Payment. Find below the step-wise admission process:
STEP 1: CUET Application Process

This central university accepts CUET scores for admission to UG, PG, and certificate programmes. Central University of Kerala admission through CUET involves CUET registration, appearing for the exam, result declaration, CUK registration for counselling, and release of merit/allotment list.
STEP 2: Register on the CUK Admission Portal

Now, candidates need to register on the CUK Samarth portal (www.cuhimachalcuet.samarth.edu.in) and fill out the online application form. After filling out the form, upload the required documents and pay the fee.
STEP 3: CUK Merit List

The application form will be scrutinised and shortlisted for further admission process. CUK category-wise merit list based on the applicant's CUET score and choices filled in during registration. Candidates are therefore required to keep checking the CUK official website.
Check outyour chances for admission to top colleges/universities based on your CUET Rank-Here!
STEP 4: Fee Payment & Document Verification

After the merit list release, shortlisted candidates may have to appear at the university to pay the fee and submit documents. Seats of the candidates who complete this within the given timeline shall be confirmed.
NOTE:The counselling procedure is explained as per the last year's admission process. Hence, is indicative.
Central University of Kerala Fees & Seats 2025

CUK feesfor all UG & PG courses include components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time fee payments. Further, seats may vary as per the course type and number of specialisations available.Central University of Kerala feescan be paid either semester-wise or yearly as per the guidelines issued by the university. Candidates can check the following table for detailed fees andCUK seat intakefor all the popular courses:

faqs.question: Can I get into CU Kerala with 85%?
faqs.answer: Central University of Kerala admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. The various entrance exams are prescribed as per the specific course choice. faqs.question: What is the placement package of Central University of Kerala?
faqs.answer: The University has released the median package details in the NIRF report 2024. During 2023 placements, the median package offered to PG (2-year) students was INR 3.26 LPA. Earlier, the median package offered in 2022 was INR 4.80 LPA. Looking at the past three years' records (2021 to 2023), a fluctuating trend was observed in the median package of PG (2-year) courses. For better understanding refer to the below table depicting the Central University of Kerala placement package trends: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) PG (2-year) INR 3.48 LPA INR 4.80 LPA INR 3.26 LPA

faqs.question: How is the Central University of Kerala for MA in Economics? What about the placement opportunities?
faqs.answer: The details for MA or Central University of Kerala MBA placement statistics have not been released officially. However, the combined placement data for PG (2-year) courses is available in the NIRF report 2024. The placement rate for PG (2-year) courses has declined year-on-year from 2021 to 2023. To know the exact percentage refer to the table below: Course Placement Rate (2021) Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023) PG (2-year) 51% 29% 19%

faqs.question: Is Central University of Kerala a good University?
faqs.answer: In terms of placements, the University has maintained a decent track record. The official placement report or brochure is yet to be released. As per the data gathered from the NIRF report 2024, 156 out of 818 PG (2-year) graduates were placed in 2023. Earlier, 234 out of 803 students were placed in the 2022 drive. Further, the median package offered in 2023 was INR 3.26 LPA, which was almost 32% less in comparison to 2022. Take a look at the below table for a detailed analysis of Central University of Kerala placement trends: Particulars Placement Statistics (2021) Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (PG-2 year) 652 803 818 Students placed (PG-2 year) 330 234 156 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 3.48 LPA INR 4.80 LPA INR 3.26 LPA NOTE: The above data is fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing MBA from Central University of Kerala?
faqs.answer: Completing MBA from central university of kerala provides a wide range of career opportunities to the candidates. Central University of kerala provides one of the best course curriculum which helps students in prospective of theoretical and practical based applications and knowledge. It provides candidates a strong grip of business solutions and skills. The placements are getting worse this year, taking a look in last year there are only 300 candidates who got placed out of 800. And the median package was also not that high. It reached around INR 3-4lakhs per annum.

hostel.description: Central University of Kerala has four (2 for Girls and 2 for Boys) transit hostels. Seats will be allotted on merit basis on a first come-first serve basis. The hostels run their own mess on sharing basis and the menu is decided by the students themselves on consensus. Sports and Recreation facilities are available in the hostels.

library.description: Library facilities and services include fully air-conditioned and automated environment, Wi-Fi network in the University Library at the main campus, free Internet access to all, UGC-Infonet, online journal access in the libraries and departments, inter-library loan, video show, reprographic service, article alert, group mail, locker, drinking water facility, and Web OPAC.

reviews.review_heading: If you're looking for the best university for M.A. economics, then I suggest this.
reviews.review_text: The college provided a broad infrastructure. Properly maintained classroom, labs with many modern equipments, clean washrooms and a library, all facilities available for students. Many different sports and clubs are organised for students' fun. Canteen food is so delicious.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best University for M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.
reviews.review_text: Particularly in terms of diversity, the infrastructure is far from sufficient. The doors at our college are still improperly sized and poorly maintained. The campus area is lovely, but not enough people use it. The majority of the campus is surrounded by trees, giving it the appearance of a woodland environment. The structures are outdated and require maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Student centric teachers.
reviews.review_text: Central University of Kerala offers more than 50 courses which is incredible. It has separate hostel facilities for male and female candidates with all the essential amenities. They also recommend some of PG if candidates are not comfortable with hostel accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best university for M.Sc. in Physics course.
reviews.review_text: Amenities at our college were highly rated. Air conditioning and microphones were provided if the instructors were unable to hear. Fast Wi-Fi was consistently available, and the classrooms were cozy. The resources in the library were quite remarkable, they effectively utilize technology and offer extensive practical insights.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for M.Com course.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was situated on 50 acres of land. The university was the only college in Kerala with a huge auditorium and a fully equipped laboratory for computer and public use. The dormitory for girls was located outside the school, while the hostel for boys was located inside. Additionally, there was a football and cricket field.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Central University of Kerala.
reviews.review_text: The college has a dedicated department building and separate classrooms with good infrastructure. There is a good library with books related to various subjects. Itep students have their hostel named Kabani and a common mess for boys and girls separately. The mess is managed by a private company that provides average-quality food. The sports meet is called Urja, and other games are also organized.

reviews.review_heading: It is a campus for students' future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel and college are good. Each classroom is digitalised and science students have separate labs for physics, zoology, chemistry, and botany. Free Wi-Fi is available in the hostel and department. The library has various books on almost all subjects. A new library building with more facilities is in progress. Hostel facilities are good. Mess food is provided by the food sutra company, so we need to pay Rs. 2700 each month. Aravalli Medical Center is available with a 24x7 ambul...

reviews.review_heading: Good opportunity to get enrolled in one of the central universities for a UG course.
reviews.review_text: We do have a Wi-Fi facility with each student having a user ID and password. Labs have been maintained for the B.Sc. stream. Classrooms are provided with seating 50 students. There are canteens and cafes inside the campus and also it has a store that has stationary items and printing facilities. There is a mess for both girls and boys which is a privatized mess by Food Sutra, weekly 2 times they offer chicken at night. There is the Aravalli Health Centre of CUK with two doctors. Sports and game...

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the finest colleges.
reviews.review_text: In this university, the hostel facility is very good. Rooms are very spacious, and water, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are also available at this university. The hostel is well-maintained, very clean, and neat, and the food provided is of very good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the peaceful atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, especially the boys' hostel, as most of them are newly constructed and have every facilities and neatness. I would recommend the hostels due to their good standard and cleanliness. However, there are sometimes Wi-Fi issues on the weekends. Other than that, you will have a standard and good hostel experience.

reviews.review_heading: Many extracurricular activities are organized on the campus.
reviews.review_text: Our university infrastructure is the best. Wi-Fi, labs, and digital classroom facilities are available at our university. Classrooms are like theaters, with a better work environment. Students can interact with teachers through transition spaces. The college has an excellent library providing academic as well as other books, and the library can be accessed at any time. Our university encourages sports, and medical services are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and standard course syllabus.
reviews.review_text: The campus is located at the heart of Trivandrum city. The campus has Wi-Fi, a library and is accessible through public transportation at all times. The classrooms are well-facilitated with projectors and amenities. Hostels are separately located for boys and girls at nearby locations which are well-guarded and facilitated. Wi-Fi is also provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Environment friendly huge campus with trees.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average but it's comparatively good as compared to other hostels in the locality. The food in the hostel is not good. They provide college hostel inside the campus and an Annex hostel which is 2km away from college. The hostel is only for girls, and they put high restrictions on movement. It's overall fine, but not highly recommended.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus and nice hostel. Enjoying the university night vibes.
reviews.review_text: The university has a lot of hostel rooms available for students, especially for those from far away who might otherwise have trouble finding accommodations. The hostels are well-furnished and clean, and there is no need for students to seek accommodations in private homes.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus, nice hostel, and enjoying the university night vibes.
reviews.review_text: In hostels, 3 people are in one room. They provide tables, chairs, beds, table lamps, and board facilities to all students. Meal quality is average. Firstly, students have to apply for the hostel. Before some days of admission, the university publishes the list of students who get the hostel.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Central University of Kerala

likes.text: The internship opportunities are very good all around India in places like NCPOAR, NCESS, IITS, But people get through entrances like NET, GATE etc.

likes.text: Yes, the hostels are really well maintained and the infrastructure is really good.

likes.text: Courses are well planned for a student to prepare parallel for entrance exams in the near future as well as gain proper knowledge.

content.Placements: People get placements after the course. Mostly, 60% get placement from the college itself. Since there is a private hospital for the college, people with good academic records get jobs there itself. 40% of people go to private hospitals for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is right near the college, so it is easy to access, and the food there is good. Classrooms are quite large, and there are enough facilities for students. The quality of food is average, but it is not a problem since we can order food from outside or nearby hotels.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.A.M.S. and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital offers MD. The fees for Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital courses range between INR 8,10,000 to 19,50,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: After B.A.M.S., you can be appointed as a consultant in hospitals and also you can be a pharmacist and MO in hospitals. B.A.M.S. has a very high ranking now in the medical sector because of its low rate of failure in medicine, and also its cost is low.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and is located in a good area. There are huge farming areas and not any industry, so there isn't any crowd. There is a good atmosphere on the campus and no ragging issues.
review_content.Faculty: The best staff are available with good teaching experience. It is the only one college in North which offers MD. It has a good name in Ayurveda society, and it is the best college in North because it works on charity. The founder of the college is a well-known social worker.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Self-practice option is available here. Government jobs are available in government hospitals. All students got an internship after completing their bachelor course, and master's degree option is also available. After completing a bachelor's of ayurvedic and medicine, we can choose ayurvedic or modern medicines.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides smart classes and library, and classrooms are also good. Our college building is good. Quality of food is good, but the canteen facility is quite average. Sports and games are not good, but medical facilities are average. Attach washrooms are not available, and the infrastructure of the hostel is also average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: After B.A.M.S., you can be appointed as a consultant in hospitals and also you can be a pharmacist and MO in hospitals. B.A.M.S. has a very high ranking now in the medical sector because of its low rate of failure in medicine, and also its cost is low.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and is located in a good area. There are huge farming areas and not any industry, so there isn't any crowd. There is a good atmosphere on the campus and no ragging issues.
content.Faculty: The best staff are available with good teaching experience. It is the only one college in North which offers MD. It has a good name in Ayurveda society, and it is the best college in North because it works on charity. The founder of the college is a well-known social worker.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Self-practice option is available here. Government jobs are available in government hospitals. All students got an internship after completing their bachelor course, and master's degree option is also available. After completing a bachelor's of ayurvedic and medicine, we can choose ayurvedic or modern medicines.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides smart classes and library, and classrooms are also good. Our college building is good. Quality of food is good, but the canteen facility is quite average. Sports and games are not good, but medical facilities are average. Attach washrooms are not available, and the infrastructure of the hostel is also average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Appication (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has absolutely bad syllabus which is totally outdated.

content.Placements: Our college has no faculty for the placements. If students get placed then it's totally dependent on students. The salary packages they get depend on the company they join and so on. If they find a good company and work hard, it is good. If not, the college is not going to give you any chance.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It has almost every facility available like Wi-Fi, computer lab, advanced library, etc. It's Wi-Fi has average speed of 60 Mbps and computer labs are fully advanced. It has hostel facilities for both boys and girls. But mess facilities are not available for them. So if you don't know cooking and want to join this college, you have to learn cooking first.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Aurangabad, Bihar and many students come from the village to study.

content.Placements: The college does not provide placements, and I am preparing for SSC exam. I had also done a B.A. from this college in 2017. I want to do SSC job. So I am preparing for SSC exams. In our college, some companies visit but every year but they choose those students who have done the vocational course. I had no idea before doing B.A. about it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is a good quality of classrooms and self-studying room. Classrooms have enough space for all the students. They also provide hostel, canteen and Wi-Fi connectivity, and there is almost every book available in the library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members, but the placements are very poor.

content.Placements: In our batch, none of the students got placements, and as far as I know, it is the same case with our seniors because the session is running too late. I think this is because Magadh University cancelled many colleges this year, so the high court put a stay on the part 3 exams for three months.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms have enough space for all the students, and there is almost every book available in the library. Labs are okay, and the campus has Wi-Fi facility open for students with decent speed. There is a gym on the campus where students who live in the college hostel are allowed.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Appication (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities but it is costly in compare to other college.

content.Placements: No placement, just I am preparing for MCA entrance exam NIMCET 2018. There is less chances to get a good job after completing BCA. In my college some companies are come but not give sufficient payment. So, I decide to do MCA from NIT college for better job.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has big infrastructure. There are good quality of classrooms and self studying room. In my colleges there are separate laboratory class of different subjects. It provides so many facilities like library, Wi-Fi, canteen etc. There is a playground in my college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Good facility but it is costly from others college.

content.Placements: There are no placements, and just I am preparing for banking exams. I am also doing M.Sc. from this college. Someone has offered me, but I did not care about that. I want to do banking job. So I am preparing for banking. There is having the less chance to give a good job from academic studies. In my college, some companies come every year, but they always choose those students who have done the vocational course. I have no idea before doing B.Sc, but I am satisfied with my course.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good facility in classrooms, library. There is Wi-Fi enabled in my college. A good medical facility is also available in my college. There is a playground in my college where students play like badminton, volleyball etc. Overall good facility is available.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sachchidanand Sinha College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has absolutely bad syllabus which is totally outdated.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It has almost every facility available like Wi-Fi, computer lab, advanced library, etc. It's Wi-Fi has average speed of 60 Mbps and computer labs are fully advanced. It has hostel facilities for both boys and girls. But mess facilities are not available for them. So if you don't know cooking and want to join this college, you have to learn cooking first.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Aurangabad, Bihar and many students come from the village to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is a good quality of classrooms and self-studying room. Classrooms have enough space for all the students. They also provide hostel, canteen and Wi-Fi connectivity, and there is almost every book available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, but the placements are very poor.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms have enough space for all the students, and there is almost every book available in the library. Labs are okay, and the campus has Wi-Fi facility open for students with decent speed. There is a gym on the campus where students who live in the college hostel are allowed.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities but it is costly in compare to other college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has big infrastructure. There are good quality of classrooms and self studying room. In my colleges there are separate laboratory class of different subjects. It provides so many facilities like library, Wi-Fi, canteen etc. There is a playground in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Good facility but it is costly from others college.
reviews.review_text: There is a good facility in classrooms, library. There is Wi-Fi enabled in my college. A good medical facility is also available in my college. There is a playground in my college where students play like badminton, volleyball etc. Overall good facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Yes according to previous report my college infrastructure are good .
reviews.review_text:
Yes the facilities of my college are good, there are separate hostel for boys and girls and different department are situated just like, department of commerce, department of Zoology. 
2. Yes, the food, medical, sport provided in my college are good .

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college.
reviews.review_text:
Wifi facilities available for both boys and girls
Ro water for both boys and girls 
Security available to ensure the safety of students 
Basic medical facilities available 
Good condition mess available and the quality of food serve is good enough for good health and hygiene 
Good environment condition 
Good conditioned furniture and good finishing work

reviews.review_heading: It is a B-grade government college.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in our college, like a library, Wi-Fi, laboratories, language lab, remedial coaching, bank, ATM and PO facilities and bus facilities. Quality of food available in the canteen is average. Medical facilities should be improved, but the sports and games facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: A good teacher can change a society.
reviews.review_text: There are five teachers in my school. Cooperation among the teachers are nice. There is also a computer lab and medical facility in my school. There are five class rooms and one kitchen room inside in one corner of the school.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has satisfactory teachers and average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The structure of our college looks like a star from the top. There is no Wi-Fi facility for personal use, but for educational work, there are computers and internet. There are well-maintained classrooms and labs with all the equipment. From time to time, sports meets are also organised by our college. Both in the morning and evening, students who are interested in sports do practice. First aid treatment is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is mind-blowing.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides superb facilities like labs, library computer labs, teaching, medical facilities, sports room, canteen and very clean rooms. I didn't face any issue in my education period. The campus is well-maintained.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at WBUHS. The minimum aggregate for most of the UG programmes is 50%. Hence, candidates with 60% or above in Class 12 are eligible to apply for admission. There is some percentage of relaxation for reserved category candidates. However, mere fulfiling the eligibility criteria will not grant admission to candidates. They must also fulfil the selection requirements for admission.
faqs.question: Can I apply for admission at WBUHS with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    WBUHS offers admission to courses based on entrance-exam scores. Candidates have to qualify the entrance-exam specific to their applied course. The university considers NEET-UG, NEET-PG, NEET-SS, etc., for admission to specific courses. Besides, the university also conducts a written test to shortlist candidates.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by WBUHS for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to fulfil the minimum required qualification and aggregate to apply for a course. The eligibility requirement is specific to each programme Below is WBUHS eligibility for top courses:CourseCommon EligibilityMBBSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateBDSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateBPharmClass 12 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Mathematics with a minimum of 50% aggregateBUMSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateMPTBPT from a recognised universityBScClass 12 in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregateMScBachelor's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission to various courses at WBUHS?

faqs.answer: A:    The following entrance examination fees are accepted by West Bengal University of Health Sciences (WBUHS) for MBA programs:  Admission to UG and PG courses via NEET-UGAdmission to MD/MS/Diploma programs via NEET-PG Other entrance exams include WBJEE, CET, JEMAT, JECA, JEHOM, JELET, PGET, and GAT-B.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Oldest medical college in Asia and still number one in West Bengal, though it needs improvement.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, there are 250 students. There is no direct placement. After 4.5 years in MBBS, you work as an intern, where you receive a stipend that depends on the college in which you are posted. On average, it is nearly equal to Rs. 40,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi and AC are available in the library. Classrooms have AC and projectors. Labs are average, as some of the instruments become non-functional. The hostel is also average, and the girls' hostel accommodation is not proper till now. Mess and canteen food are good overall.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Follow and listen to your passion.

review_content.Placements: As this is a medical college, 100 percent got placed here, some got good placement, some got medium. The highest package offered in our college is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 30 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Apollo, Manipal, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

overview_faqs.question: Is WBUHS good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: You can study for an MBA at the West Bengal College of Health Sciences in Kolkata. The college helps students find jobs by partnering with hospitals, healthcare facilities, and research organizations. Some top employers for graduates are Apollo Hospitals, Fortis Healthcare, Medanta, and Max Healthcare, as well as the topmost organisations. WBUHS also provides job placement opportunities, and about 60% of their graduates have found employment in various industries.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at WBUHS?
overview_faqs.answer: West Bengal University of Health Sciences fee is a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Candidates have to pay an admission fee to confirm their seat in the university. Below is WBUHS fee for top courses:CourseTotal Tuition FeeMBBSINR 40,500 - INR 99.1 lakhBPharmINR 4.8 lakhBUMSINR 6.8 lakhMPTINE 2.2 lakhBScINR 1.4 lakh - INR 23.4 lakhMScINR 17,800 - INR 24,000Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the application fee for admission to WBUHS?
overview_faqs.answer: Aspirants have to pay a application fee in the form of draft or challan for admission. Candidates have to pay the application fee specific to their programme. Below is the WBUHS application fee for a few courses:CourseApplication FeeMScINR 3,000BScINR 2,000

overview_faqs.question: What is the B.Pharm fee at WBUHS?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for WBUHS BPharm is INR 4.8 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The total fee of BPharm is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Candidates have to register for WBJEE for BPharm course offered by WBUHS.

review_summary.college_name: WBUHS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling.

content.Placements: Many students prefer to pursue PG after completion of the course. Many students get job offers. The average package offered is 7 LPA. Internships are mandatory in government hospitals. Roles offered are JR and medical officer. The private hospital offers an attractive salary.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay. Labs have all the required instruments and devices for practical experience. The library is also present, and it is good. Wi-Fi facility is available with limited data. There is a sports ground. Overall, it's quite good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed from my course. No package given, only a salary of Rs. 12000 per month. No top company hires from our college. A physiotherapist has a great role but no role in our lives. Our college could not provide any placement. Our internship does not give any salary.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Oldest medical college in Asia and still number one in West Bengal, though it needs improvement.

content.Placements: In our batch, there are 250 students. There is no direct placement. After 4.5 years in MBBS, you work as an intern, where you receive a stipend that depends on the college in which you are posted. On average, it is nearly equal to Rs. 40,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi and AC are available in the library. Classrooms have AC and projectors. Labs are average, as some of the instruments become non-functional. The hostel is also average, and the girls' hostel accommodation is not proper till now. Mess and canteen food are good overall.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Follow and listen to your passion.

content.Placements: As this is a medical college, 100 percent got placed here, some got good placement, some got medium. The highest package offered in our college is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 30 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Apollo, Manipal, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good college in WB.

content.Placements: Placements were good but not according to proper choices, as the people who were the closest to the management were given proper places. Rest of the things were good, and the salary was good. I left the job because it was far away from me. The bond penalty was Menace for 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Totally the best in West Bengal, and the hostel was too good. The people come here get single rooms and get bonded to each other easily. Hostels were clean but the mess food was absolute mess and better to avoid here for eating and eat outside for good.

admission_overview.college_name: WBUHS Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: WBUHS admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as NEET-UG, NEET-PG, etc. for specific courses.WBUHSalso conducts written tests for admission to BSc, BPT, MPT, etc. The university offers UG, PG and doctoral-level courses via affiliated colleges. The programmes are offered across various streams such as Medicine, Dental, Pharmacy, etc.
WBUHS offers programmes in full-time mode. The university offers more than 25 courses across various streams. Below are the key highlights forWBUHS admissions:
Particulars
WBUHS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered

WBUHS offers admission to courses based on their entrance exam score. The university also conducts written tests for admission to a few courses. Candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria to apply for a course. Below areWBUHS coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
*In the absence of information, data has been taken from an unofficial source. Hence, might vary.

The total fee of WBUHS is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Candidates have to pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university. Some of the fee components such as caution deposit are one-time payable. Below isWBUHS feeand intake for popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
WBUH selection criteria are course-specific. Candidates must follow the requirements applicable to their programme for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in WBUHS:
Step 1: WBUHS Application Process 2025

Candidates applying for MBBS and BDS have to apply for NEET. For MD, MS, aspirants have to fill out the NEET PG application form. Candidates can get the application form and the information booklet offline. Aspirants can also apply online. Aspirants have to pay an application fee to register for a course.
Step 2: Selection

WBUHS selects candidates based on national or university-level entrance exam scores. The university considers NEET-UG, NEET-PG, NEET-SS, etc. for admission to specific courses. WBUHS also conducts a written test for admission to BSc, MSc, BPT, MPT and other programmes. Further, the university releases a merit list based on the entrance exam score of the candidates.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

For national-level entrance exams, candidates have to participate in West Bengal NEET Counselling. Aspirants who have appeared for the university entrance exam have to apply for counselling conducted by WBUHS. Selected aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat at WBUHS?
faqs.answer: WBUHS provides admission to candidates based on national or university-level entrance exam scores. faqs.question: Can I apply for admission at WBUHS with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at WBUHS. The minimum aggregate for most of the UG programmes is 50%. Hence, candidates with 60% or above in Class 12 are eligible to apply for admission. There is some percentage of relaxation for reserved category candidates. However, mere fulfiling the eligibility criteria will not grant admission to candidates. They must also fulfil the selection requirements for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get into WBUHS with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, You can get into WBHUS with 70%marks in class 12th, As their requirement is to you have to be passed in class 12th with minimum 50% and for sc, sts with 45%. But on other hand they conduct national level entrance exams for some courses and for some courses they directly take interview and aptitude test in which you  have to be passed, you can check accordingly to your course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are okay. Labs have all the required instruments and devices for practical experience. The library is also present, and it is good. Wi-Fi facility is available with limited data. There is a sports ground. Overall, it's quite good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vidyasagar Institute of HealthReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.
reviews.review_text: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Medical College KolkataReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Oldest medical college in Asia and still number one in West Bengal, though it needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi and AC are available in the library. Classrooms have AC and projectors. Labs are average, as some of the instruments become non-functional. The hostel is also average, and the girls' hostel accommodation is not proper till now. Mess and canteen food are good overall.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Follow and listen to your passion.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by ESI-PGIMSR Medical College and Hospital, JokaReviewed on 25 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good college in WB.
reviews.review_text: Totally the best in West Bengal, and the hostel was too good. The people come here get single rooms and get bonded to each other easily. Hostels were clean but the mess food was absolute mess and better to avoid here for eating and eat outside for good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Bankura Sammilani Medical CollegeReviewed on 8 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's a great college with great teachers.
reviews.review_text: Here the course is MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery), a great course for which a lot of students dream and do everything for it. You have to crack the NEET UG exam with a good rank for admission in this college. Here you will get college after 1st year, which is also great.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Haldia Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 9 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Almost everything is good in our college, the faculty and placements are both good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is in good condition. All facilities are available in our department. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. The labs and classroom are good, and the canteen in our college is also good. Sports and games are so interesting in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Nursing and  Research, KalyaniReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good for students. The teacher-student relationship is very good.
reviews.review_text: There was a very friendly atmosphere, and Warden Ma'am is too good. The food quality is average. Four-time food is provided. If any medical issue occurs, then you can go to the hospital. The hostel is beside the hospital, just 10 minutes away. The hospital's name is JNM, Kalyani.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Metropolitan Homoeopathic Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 26 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best private homoeopathic college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: All departments are available here. Now, PG will start within a few years. There is free Wi-Fi and a well-maintained library. All departments have separate labs for practicals with knowledgeable lab assistants. It has all departments like anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, organon, materia medica, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Nursing and  Research, KalyaniReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good academics and clinical training, but placements and hostel facilities can improve.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided for the B.Sc. nursing course at IINR are fairly well-developed and student-friendly. The institute provides Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, which helps students access online study materials and journals. Classrooms are spacious, equipped with whiteboards and projectors.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by IQ City Medical CollegeReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and healthy campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at IQ City Medical College is quite good for academics and hostel life. The classrooms are spacious with SMART boards, proper seating, and good ventilation. Labs are well-equipped for practicals, and the central library has a wide collection of medical books with Wi-Fi access and a peaceful reading hall. Hostel facilities are satisfactory, with clean rooms, attached washrooms, and decent Wi-Fi. The mess provides hygienic food, though the taste could be improved, while the canteen ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The hidden gem  -  NBMC&H.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in the academics are well built, but they lag behind in the hostel. Library is fully air conditioned and has a permanent Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is also very pockets friendly. It consists of 12 rupees per month. The campus is too huge.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Midnapore Medical College And HospitalReviewed on 26 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very affordable college for the MBBS course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. The library is available with a huge collection of quality and reference books. Labs are well-equipped with instruments and equipment. The quality of the hostel is also good. Limited sports facilities are present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied with the faculty members, college infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: Campus was spread around 161 acres, one of the largest medical campuses in India. Wi-Fi and internet were available all over campus. It provided fully equipped labs for anatomy, physiology, microbiology, etc. There was a central library with huge amount of books, journals, digital resources, etc. Quality of food was good and served with hygiene.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by IQ City Medical CollegeReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has a modern campus and good clinical exposure. Overall, it is expensive.
reviews.review_text: Our college has modern air-conditioned lecture halls, digital and smart classrooms, a central library with online journals, well-equipped labs, and skill labs for clinical training. Hostels are spacious with Wi-Fi, study rooms, and common areas. The food in the mess is average but hygienic. On-campus medical care, ambulance, sports grounds, gym, and indoor games add to campus life.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I don't know about 2015, but now our college has totally changed.

review_content.Placements: The salary package offered ranges from 2.5 LPA to 7 LPA. Aurobindo and our college are linked up with Apollo Hospital Jubilee Hills. Some got jobs as clinical pharmacists in hospitals, while others got jobs in colleges that only teach Pharm.D. courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The labs and library are well-maintained. There is no hostel available for this college. The department is so good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers will help in subjects, and they will think we should qualify for all subjects. Staff are good and will understand the problems of students. Faculty members provide quick responses. There are no semester exams for Pharma.D. Only final exams are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members, students and college are very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75% of the students got placed in our college. Divi's Laboratories, Apollo, MedPlus and Dr Reddy's Laboratories are companies which also selected our collegemates. The college offers courses like B.Pharmacy, M.Pharmacy, PharmD and PhD. B.Pharmacy students are offered the lowest salary package, and M.Pharmacy students are offered the highest salary package. Almost 89 students got an internship. In this course, students are going for an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: For our department, canteen is available, but a playground is not available. If you want to play, then our engineering college ground is available here to play. In our hostel, they serve fried rice and chicken and weekly two times non-vegetarian, and Wi-Fi and ambulance are also available.

overview_faqs.question: Can Sri Venkateshwara College Of Pharmacy be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Venkateshwara College Of Pharmacy is a distinguished institution offering Pharm.D, M.Pharma, D.Pharma, B.Pharma. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Sri Venkateshwara College Of Pharmacy is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Sri Venkateshwara College Of Pharmacy has received an impressive review rating of 3.55 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.75 for Campus Life, 3.13 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Venkateshwara College Of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am really disappointed with the placements.

content.Placements: No students get placed on-campus. Even they are not giving any hope. For placements, they took Rs 2,000 but no company came. When I joined here there was no official website. No single video is available on social media unfortunately, I joined here.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, cafeteria, or parking. In my college, area is very small and poor infrastructure. There is no proper action for students problems, and they are not willing to rectify the students issues. There are some teachers who are showing partiality with the students.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members, but the infrastructure is below average.

content.Placements: An average number of students from our college got placed in a few pharmaceutical companies. Our college met up with a few companies. They take students, and it's not a good number of students getting placed, but we have a good hospital tied up with us, so it is helpful.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not good. There is no hostel in our college, and there isn't even a canteen for our college. Our college has an old building. The labs are not good, and they have the required materials, but their maintenance is average.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I don't know about 2015, but now our college has totally changed.

content.Placements: The salary package offered ranges from 2.5 LPA to 7 LPA. Aurobindo and our college are linked up with Apollo Hospital Jubilee Hills. Some got jobs as clinical pharmacists in hospitals, while others got jobs in colleges that only teach Pharm.D. courses.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The labs and library are well-maintained. There is no hostel available for this college. The department is so good.
content.Faculty: Teachers will help in subjects, and they will think we should qualify for all subjects. Staff are good and will understand the problems of students. Faculty members provide quick responses. There are no semester exams for Pharma.D. Only final exams are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members, students and college are very good.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of the students got placed in our college. Divi's Laboratories, Apollo, MedPlus and Dr Reddy's Laboratories are companies which also selected our collegemates. The college offers courses like B.Pharmacy, M.Pharmacy, PharmD and PhD. B.Pharmacy students are offered the lowest salary package, and M.Pharmacy students are offered the highest salary package. Almost 89 students got an internship. In this course, students are going for an internship.
content.Infrastructure: For our department, canteen is available, but a playground is not available. If you want to play, then our engineering college ground is available here to play. In our hostel, they serve fried rice and chicken and weekly two times non-vegetarian, and Wi-Fi and ambulance are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Teachers, infrastructure, facilities, etc., are good.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placed. MNC companies USFDA company also select students. All students attended internships, and many students got placements. They are working in abroad UAE.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure was good, and they have a library and lab facilities. Hostel rooms were excellent. Canteen is also very good, and food facilities and water facilities are also good. They provided drinking water and bathing water, but problems arise regularly. In summer, the container water tank is provided.
content.Faculty: Teachers explained in a good way. They were well-educated and have completed a master degree and PhD. They are placed in industry and hospital pharmacist, and many people are working in a pharmacy and lab technician.

college_info.college_name: State K.G.K. Government Medical College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good in studies with best teachers.

review_content.Placements: I am in the 2022 batch. The capacity of one batch is 125 students, and many of them get well settled. The senior-junior relationship is very good. Placements are mainly in government jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a good ground for playing. Mess food is good. Best Wi-Fi. It is a good place for homeopathy. The OPD always has 500+ patients daily, so you get to take cases and learn many things.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and mostly Ph.D. holders with excellent experience. Many co-curricular activities happen at least twice a month. Semester exams are not tough if you study daily and properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Many students are doing government jobs as M.O and CMO. Some are running their clinic and getting handsome salaries. Few of them are in private colleges working as a teacher in private clinics. The average salary package offered was 10 LPA. The minimum salary package offered was 1 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls. Mess is available. Drinking water facility is available 24X7. Our college also provides electricity 24X7. Classrooms are not good because they require painting. Wi-Fi facility is not available in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best homoeopathic colleges in UP.

review_content.Placements: In homoeopathy, just after passing BHMS placements are not guaranteed. It all depends upon your clinical knowledge and all the knowledge that you have learned during the whole course. I am from 2019 BHMS batch. State KGK Homoeopathic Medical College, Moradabad offers you quality education. This college offers BHMS course and you can get admission there by qualifying NEET and through counselling. Many of our seniors got selected in government jobs and got selected in AIAPGET for MD in homoeopathy too.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of State KGK Homoeopathic Medical College is average. College and girls' hostel buildings were built around 1990. Although boys hostel is comparatively good as it was renovated around 2015. Quality of food in the mess is below average. You have to rely on yourself or tiffin services for food. There is no free Wi-Fi on campus. Annually sports meet is organised here. You can play volleyball, badminton, cricket, etc., in hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a typical government college.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is 89%. Graduates can find jobs as doctors or in research, with salaries ranging from 3 lakhs to 12 lakhs, depending on the position. Government organizations like CCRH are possible employers. Completing a 100% internship is required for a medical degree. Other job options include working in medical offices and teaching as a professor or lecturer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is bad, and Wi-Fi is not for students. Labs are not spacious enough. Classrooms are being renovated. They are small no AC not much to say apparently just working. The hostel is being renovated Library is average so can't say much. OPD is a small building that is worn out.

description: The State K.G.K. Government Medical College BHMS Cutoff 2024 has been released for the fifth round. The cutoff for the BHMS was released based on category for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD category candidates. Looking at the Round 5 Cutoff for 2024, the closing rank for General AI quota candidates was 157390. The most in-demand course as per the cutoff list is Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery.

The fifth round of State K.G.K. Government Medical College cutoff 2024 has been released, for the candidates seeking admission to the BHMS via AYUSH NEET. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 5 Seat Allotment Result, the most difficult course was Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery with a cutoff rank of 157390 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

State K.G.K. Government Medical College admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG scores, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

review_content.Infrastructure: There is the best quality of food and facilities of the hostel. In the hostel facility, Wi-Fi is available RO water is available and there is also geyser. review_summary.college_name: Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and learning environment with average placement and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: I am from B.Tech CSE (AI&ML). 60-70% of students from my course are placed through campus recruitment at approximately 6 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA - 3 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Infosys is the top company, along with a few startups. 80% (UPSDM) get internships as cybersecurity analysts.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of the computer science department are satisfactory and support both academic and learning activities. The campus is fully Wi-Fi connected and has a computer lab with an AI updated system. It has well-maintained computer labs with smart classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are nice and good..

content.Placements: The maximum number of seats for my course is 120, and we have over 60 students in class. B.Sc. courses do not provide recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The library is very good, with there is quite a good amount of books. The infrastructure of the library is also nice, and the overall campus is beautiful. The main academic block is also good. Currently, the university is under construction, but the campus is still beautiful. Classrooms are spacious.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are nice, and the course curriculum is also relevant. Exams are moderate, and there are strict rules during examinations. Teachers are qualified, knowledgeable, and friendly. They also make sure that you understand everything they teach. If you focus on your lectures, you will do well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college days are the best part of my life.

content.Placements: 65% of students were placed with the highest package of 5.5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Byju's, L&T, HCL, etc. 65 percent of internships are done by CPWD & other IT companies. There are some companies, like Samsung, Microsoft, Google, and HCL, and also construction companies that provide student placement and internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is the best quality of food and facilities of the hostel. In the hostel facility, Wi-Fi is available RO water is available and there is also geyser. There are some play activities like table tennis, badminton, and also table tennis. Medical faculty are good. Hostels in my area are really eco friendly and the best ability of electricity and innovation is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My university at a glance.

content.Placements: The main problem here is the placement issue. Because the placement rate is very poor. Hardly any student got placements from this university. A few students got placed in companies like HDFC Bank, Zepto etc. The internship rate is also very poor and no one got an internship from here.
content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure. The department has Wi-Fi and a library with all books. The university has a playground and canteen. Classrooms are also excellent. They are air-conditioned and have all the basic equipment and facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the infrastructure, smart classes, and helpful and friendly faculty.

content.Placements: The placements are average. Around 50-60% of students get placed overall. The highest package is around 10 LPA, while the lowest package is 1.8 LPA. The recruiting companies like U Certify, Pie Infocom, and Genpact have recruited students based on their requirements and talents. I am in my 3rd semester, and till now, none of us has been offered any kind of internship. The top roles that have been offered are Software Developer and Subject Matter Expert.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best. The seats are really comfortable, along with wide classrooms. Labs are well furnished, and the library has a wide range of books available in each field of study. Wi-Fi is available, and the systems in each lab have the best specifications. Hostel rooms are quite good, and the food quality is better than other hostels. For sports and games, a separate building is there, along with all the equipment and a proper gym.
