admission_process.title: Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University admission 2025isentrance-basedfor the majority of the programmes. The university was named afterSufi SaintKhwaja Moinuddin Chishti (Gharib Nawaaz) ofAjmer. It provides education through itssix faculty departmentsspecialised inArts &Humanities, Science, Engineering,Legal Scienceetc.KMLCU Lucknowoffers various programmes at UG, PG, and diploma levels. The programmes includeBTech, MBA,BCA, LLB, andB.Edetc.

Also, the university offers UG and PG level programmes specialised in a wide range oflanguagessuch asUrdu, Arabic, Persian, English,Hindi, and many more. These programmes are delivered under thefaculty ofArts & Humanities. Admission to theseKMCLU language coursesis accepted through theCUET exam. .

paragraphs: The highest package offered during KMCLU BTech placements 2024 stood at INR 9 LPA . Further, a total of 200 students were placed during KMCLU placements 2024. Earlier, the university has released the placement report for the year 2023. As per the placement report 2023, the highest package and average package offered to BTech students stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively. Further, a total of 200 students and 70 FoET students were placed during Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University placements 2023. Apart from this, many top companies such as Microsoft, Tech Mahindra, and Genpact among others visited the campus during the recent placement drive.

During the recent placement drive, the the highest package offered to students was INR 9LPA and average was INR 6 LPA . Almost 70-80 percent students got placed. The resonable fees structure should also be kept in mind, the fees for each and every course available to pursue at this institute is very less. faqs.question: Who are some top recruiters for B.Tech at Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University?
faqs.answer: The top recruiters for Btech at Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University were Microsoft, Tech Mahindra, and Genpact. The salary packages offered by these companies were also the highest. Many other companies also visited to Institute like HDFC bank, IBM etc. Amost 200 students of B.Tech got placements in the recent placements drive. 500 students completed thier summer internships and trainings. If we see the number of students who got placed, we can say that a good ratio of students got placement.

faqs.question: Who were the recruiters at the Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Urdu, Arabi~Farsi University placements 2023?
faqs.answer: The top recruiters at Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Urdu, Arabi-Farsi University placements 2023 include Microsoft, Tech Mahindra, Genpact, Concentrix, HDFC Bank, KGMU MRI, Larsen And Toubro, Mns Credit Management Group, Press Monitor, Pie Infocomm, Renault-Nissan. The university placements 2023 were from various sectors such as IT, banking, and engineering. The university has recorded an increase in placements of about 148% for the session 2020-21 as compared to 2019-20.

faqs.question: What is the BA application fee at Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pay an application fee for BA registration and the application form for admission 2024. The BSc application fee at Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Urdu Arabi-Farsi University fee is tabulated below: Category Application fee Gen and OBC INR 500 SC/St INR 250 *This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Does Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University refund fee for its BBA course?
faqs.answer: Application fees which is paid at the time of filling the application form is not refundable. The furthur registration fees and tution fees may be refundable. Most of the Universities do not refund the application fees but refund the other fees, if the student changes his/her mind. It is advisable to the students, to make thier final decision very thoroughly, So that they may not face any problem for the refund of the fees. The institute has not clearly mentioned that they refund the fees or not, students can check the intitute's official website for detailed information.

hostel_campus.college_name: Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and learning environment with average placement and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the computer science department are satisfactory and support both academic and learning activities. The campus is fully Wi-Fi connected and has a computer lab with an AI updated system. It has well-maintained computer labs with smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are nice and good..
reviews.review_text: The library is very good, with there is quite a good amount of books. The infrastructure of the library is also nice, and the overall campus is beautiful. The main academic block is also good. Currently, the university is under construction, but the campus is still beautiful. Classrooms are spacious.

reviews.review_heading: My college days are the best part of my life.
reviews.review_text: There is the best quality of food and facilities of the hostel. In the hostel facility, Wi-Fi is available RO water is available and there is also  geyser. There are some play activities like table tennis, badminton, and also table tennis. Medical faculty are good. Hostels in my area are really eco friendly and the best ability of electricity and innovation is also available.

reviews.review_heading: My university at a glance.
reviews.review_text: We have good infrastructure. The department has Wi-Fi and a library with all books. The university has a playground and canteen. Classrooms are also excellent. They are air-conditioned and have all the basic equipment and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the infrastructure, smart classes, and helpful and friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best. The seats are really comfortable, along with wide classrooms. Labs are well furnished, and the library has a wide range of books available in each field of study. Wi-Fi is available, and the systems in each lab have the best specifications. Hostel rooms are quite good, and the food quality is better than other hostels. For sports and games, a separate building is there, along with all the equipment and a proper gym.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in my department is very good. There is Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, it is all dark red color like old buildings. It is very impressive and attractive. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is also good. The food quality available in the mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Students who are toppers should take admission in our college.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in our college like a good and easy to read library, good hostel, and comfortable classrooms. Large rooms are designed to accommodate a large number of students for lectures or presentations. There is also a big ground in our college in which lots of students play cricket, basketball, etc. The quality of food available in a hostel is average and taste is average.

reviews.review_heading: About 5 to 6% of students only get placed.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, with air conditioning in every class and good washrooms, and the department of labs and classes is very nice. The hostel is below average with cleaning and very nice accommodation. Sports and gyms are the best in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is not very good but the teacher is very supportive and helpful. And
reviews.review_text: The facilities is very supporting. And the infrastructure is very stylish and the main building is red in colour and the hostel rooms is in very good condition. The food in hostel is very good. We also have a volleyball and basketball team in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Not so good, not so bad.
reviews.review_text: I would rate the infrastructure as 3 because it’s neither poor nor good. Some classrooms have AC while others don't. The courses and departments are good, and the hostel is also average. The Wi-Fi limit is only 1 GB a day, and the food quality in the mess is average. There is a gym with good equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Why it will be beneficial for you to take admission here!
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college available for my course was good. I got good classrooms with advanced teaching methods and a big, spacious lab with high-speed internet connection. If we talk about hostel, mess and canteen, then you will be fully satisfied with it.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best and underrated University of Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The university has an amazing, grand-sized library; a student can make a library card and take books for free. This Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Language University is one of the underrated universities that offers such professional courses at such a price. The university is so grand in size, clean, and green as well. They conducted regularly programs, and in winter they conduct music concerts, and the university has a huge field that is for cricket and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: The reality of KMCLU Lucknow and its placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite decent; however, there is no Wi-Fi available for students on campus. The labs are okay with decent hardware and internet connections. The library is not that spacious and quiet. All in all, the campus and facilities are average and do not leave the impression that students usually seek when selecting a college for their graduation.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with faculty and placements. Attendance not Mandatory.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay as per the feels but lacks basic facilities like hygiene, clean drinking water, clean washrooms, and Wi-Fi. Only the admin building has Wi-Fi, but it's not for the students. Upper floor classrooms don't have light; the building is decent. The library is useless, though you have a good common study room with AC and Wi-Fi facility, it is small.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, but there are issues of placement, but the faculty is good and cooperative.
reviews.review_text:
There are a lot of good things, like classes, labs, and sports facilities. The library is also a good environment. 
Hostel is also average, mess food is not good, canteen is okay. I suggest that you avoid hostel because mess food is not good, as well as there is no internet.

reviews_list.review_title: Great experience studying in rims

review_content.Placements: There is no such thing called placements in mbbs colleges, you will get to do a one year compulsory rotatory medical internship where you will get great exposure to different kinds of cases, you will get great clinical exposure and you can develop skills which can make you survive in your career moving forward.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is average, there is no canteen in college premises.Central Library is awesome with recently established digital library you can find books of all years. Sports facilities are good, there are tournaments every year for different sports, if you are interested in sports the tournaments would be awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best medical colleges in Karnataka.

review_content.Placements: Around 150 students got placed in our course. Our college provides good internship opportunities for students. Our college is good in terms of education.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped hospital. Doctors are good. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Classrooms are spacious and good. They are equipped with air-conditioners. They serve chicken every night. The food served in the mess is good.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are good. They have completed their degrees. The teaching quality is good. They are friendly but at the same time, they maintain discipline. They take hours of a seminar to build self-confidence in your life. Overall, our campus is very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Totally, our college is very good both academically and in cultural programmes.

review_content.Placements: All of them are placed in packages of about 6-7 LPA. Almost 100 percent of the students got an internship from our course medical officer in the PHC centre, which is offered by our course. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. There is a digital library present, which has more books and also computer labs have very good infrastructure and maintenance. Classrooms have sufficient seating capacity and have digital boards, which are helpful for learning purposes. The quality of food is nice in the hostel, and also in the canteen. There are various sports on campus, such as badminton, cricket, volleyball, throwball and basketball.

review_summary.college_name: Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the good faculty members, but it should provide ventilation.

content.Placements: About 150 students take admission every year. The salary is offered only to the people who conduct internships and teaching and other staff members. Since it is a medical course, companies don't visit. Internships will be provided in the same college hospital.
content.Infrastructure: There is no free Wi-Fi facility, but there are good labs, classrooms and a library. But proper ventilation is not available in classrooms. The quality of facilities provided in the hostel such as food, etc., is average. Since it is a medical college hostel, medical facilities are good. Sports and games are rarely provided.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Reality of Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences, Raichur.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placement opportunities, it does provide compulsory rotating internships for 365 days in the district hospital of Raichur. The hospital sees a huge patient load of about 2500 patients per day for a batch of 150 students, which provides good practical experience. In addition, the teaching faculty is good, which helps students gain admission to postgraduate programs. The students are also provided with a monthly salary of INR 30,000.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is vast, and four stories high. It has four lecture halls, one big auditorium, and one mini auditorium. There is a large library where students can read or borrow books. There are different laboratories for different departments. The hostel building is five stories high and has 164 rooms and two study halls where students can study at night. The mess is affordable, and the average monthly bill is about 3200 rupees.

admission_process.title: Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Admission at Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG and PG level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inRaichur Institute of Medical Sciences, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include NEET, NEET PG, and KCET, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. See below more insights on admissions forRaichur Institute of Medical Sciences courses:

description: Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 22776 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 22776 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23033 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 61029 to 157119. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pathology, followed by MD in Bio-Chemistry. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 61029 and 157119, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In this section, Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 51114 for MBBS.

Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in Pathology with a closing cutoff rank of 27777 for the General AI category candidates.

hostel_campus.college_name: Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the good faculty members, but it should provide ventilation.
reviews.review_text: There is no free Wi-Fi facility, but there are good labs, classrooms and a library. But proper ventilation is not available in classrooms. The quality of facilities provided in the hostel such as food, etc., is average. Since it is a medical college hostel, medical facilities are good. Sports and games are rarely provided.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Raichur Institute of Medical Sciences, Raichur.
reviews.review_text: The college building is vast, and four stories high. It has four lecture halls, one big auditorium, and one mini auditorium. There is a large library where students can read or borrow books. There are different laboratories for different departments. The hostel building is five stories high and has 164 rooms and two study halls where students can study at night. The mess is affordable, and the average monthly bill is about 3200 rupees.

reviews.review_heading: Great experience studying in rims
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is average, there is no canteen in college premises.Central Library is awesome with recently established digital library you can find books of all years. Sports facilities are good, there are tournaments every year for different sports, if you are interested in sports the tournaments would be awesome.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in Karnataka.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-equipped hospital. Doctors are good. Medical facilities are available 24X7. Classrooms are spacious and good. They are equipped with air-conditioners. They serve chicken every night. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Totally, our college is very good both academically and in cultural programmes.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. There is a digital library present, which has more books and also computer labs have very good infrastructure and maintenance. Classrooms have sufficient seating capacity and have digital boards, which are helpful for learning purposes. The quality of food is nice in the hostel, and also in the canteen. There are various sports on campus, such as badminton, cricket, volleyball, throwball and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good in every aspect. Food and hospitality are good.
reviews.review_text: College campus is good. We have our own hospital where we get a lot of experience. College does not offer hostel facilities for boys. Hostel facility for girls is available. Girls hostel and mess food are tasty. Our college conducts cultural events and sports meets every year.

reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college with great faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Never heard of good placements, but as far as I've seen, there are a good number of placements, actually a decent amount of placements. It depends on how you study, but as far as I've seen, I've seen good companies like TVS and pharmaceutical companies are recruiting. Strong placement support with top recruiters and great for freshers aiming for IT/finance roles. Best for driven students in a practical setup.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, but poorly maintained. If it is maintained well, it would be great. But it's so pleasant to spend time in college. It's so cool and the best to spend in college is rainy, very good. It's so good with lush green trees and greenery. Library is the best in the college.

All the private, government, and electrical device manufacturing companies hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. Labs are clean and neat. All the equipment is available. Classrooms are very neat. The canteen is neat and clean with good food facilities. individual_reviews.title: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.

content.Placements: Students have performed very well this year. A total of 286 students passed all exams this year. All students got a good percentage, and they have been placed in good companies. reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-maintained classrooms. The library is very big with more books. We have high security in the college.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for a good college with great faculty and infrastructure, this is it.
reviews.review_text: Decent classrooms, I would say. Don't expect them to be great. They are not well-maintained, but it's enough to study in them. The library is well-equipped with books that help you in your studies and personal life. Wi-Fi is not available for the students, but the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college with great faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, but poorly maintained. If it is maintained well, it would be great. But it's so pleasant to spend time in college. It's so cool and the best to spend in college is rainy, very good. It's so good with lush green trees and greenery. Library is the best in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Now, placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Labs are clean and neat. All the equipment is available. Classrooms are very neat. The canteen is neat and clean with good food facilities. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted in other colleges, and prizes will be given to participating students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gets almost a number of placements, and every year, 900 students are placed.
reviews.review_text: In the college, we have a canteen and a big place to sit anywhere, and we have good facilities and infrastructure. Also in the college, we have the library, labs, and classrooms. The hostel food is very nice and it looks like our homely food and also washing machines, Wi-Fi, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.
reviews.review_text: Labs are average and classes are average. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Hostel is waste and the food is average. Medical facilities and sports are average. Hostel looks like a regular, which is not a building. We will suffer due to more sheets in the hostel rooms and fans are not nice.

reviews.review_heading: Not bad, and improvement can be seen in the coming 3-4 years.
reviews.review_text: The college has many buildings and a lot of space, but it has failed to utilize that space efficiently. When we first joined, labs were not in good condition, and some did not have properly functioning computers. Now, in the final year, all labs have been upgraded with new equipment and computers. However, the network problem still persists.

reviews.review_heading: College was very good once upon a time, but now it is above average. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in our college is average. Wi-Fi is not available, and the signal is not available. Labs are the one we prefer and classrooms are general. Library is the good place in our college. Facilities and infrastructure are available for our department.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really awesome and very joyful, and the annual festival is heaven-fun. A clean and beautiful library and more informative books are there. Classrooms have AC and LED screens, and Wi-Fi is also provided by the college for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.
reviews.review_text: This college is okay. The library, faculty, labs are just okay, and students having bikes can reach the college easily. It's a bit of a hassle for students with no vehicle facility because the college is about 1 km distance from the main road. College hostel is available but not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Poor placements and poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is normal and not much good. All facilities are not available. Only classrooms, library, canteen, labs, and computers are available in the college. Also, there are no groups for our college here. Food is average in our campus hostels which are allocated for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has big and good infrastructure. The best year for placements was 2017, and the faculty
reviews.review_text:
I would rate the infrastructure of the college 10/10. Wi-Fi is available, and we have large classrooms. Our library contains biographical books, course-based books, subject books, and also delves into the history of CSE or deep thoughts for CSE.

Hostel life for me in our college was average. They serve food well, and they are very strict about rules and regulations. They have medicine for emergency purposes. We have a large ground for cricket, a volleyball court, and a basketball court. They al...

reviews.review_heading: A review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: There are many infrastructure facilities available for the courses here at the college. There are separate labs for students from different branches, and classrooms are divided by branches. The college also offers sports facilities, with separate grounds for each sport, like cricket and volleyball courts, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available for the course is abundant here at the college, with separate labs for students of different branches and classrooms divided by branches. The college also offers sports facilities with separate grounds for each sport, such as a cricket field and a volleyball court.

reviews.review_heading: If the students will study on their own, they can join this college.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms at our college are below average and we have Wi-Fi connections. The library in our college is a very good place to read and gain knowledge; there are more than 35,000 books in our course.
The hostel and the food are very good. In our college, there are no sports .

At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research (ABIPER) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. content.Placements: Over 80% of students in my course were placed. The total cost of studying, including hostel fees, is over 2 lakhs. There are no packages for my course, but the majority of students from our college got internships in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: For my course, they provided 24-hour Wi-Fi for college purposes. There were different labs for different subjects where we could conduct our experiments. The classrooms were technologically advanced, equipped with TVs and projectors, and were like smart classrooms.

paragraphs: Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research (ABIPER) admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research (ABIPER)offers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels. Some of the courses include B.Pharma, D.Pharma and M.Pharma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 50,000 - 3,50,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

library.description: Digital library with Wi-Fi internet facility
Digital library with Wi-Fi internet facility

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: This college has one of the best infrastructure. I am a Pharma.D student. Classrooms are good and labs are too clean. Library is also good, we will get required books from library. The hostel is also good. The canteen food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure of both the college and hostel, no placement.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, simple labs, simple classrooms, average library where there are more restrictions than the books that are actually needed. The worst hostel with double-decker Bed (6 pax in a single room), average canteen, no medical facilities, decent auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is available in our course. The department of commerce is very good. Wi-Fi is available in our college. We have multiple labs for every sense. Classrooms are very hygienic. The quantity of the food in the hostel is very good in Muscat. We have medical faculty members to see students. We have multiple sports in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Seniors told us that this college was in the top 5 best colleges in 2020. It's a great thing.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are what we like. The college structure, and canteen food, are really good. The classroom protection facilities, AC, and also 24*7 electricity. The chemistry lab arrangement is also really nice. Sports are rare during the period when we are completing our exams.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: For my course, they provided 24-hour Wi-Fi for college purposes. There were different labs for different subjects where we could conduct our experiments. The classrooms were technologically advanced, equipped with TVs and projectors, and were like smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is average but hostel facilities are not good. For studying it's a good college .
reviews.review_text: There are around 1000 students in hostels which are available for 90,000 per annum. I stay in a hostel so I don't know much about the PG. Food is a bit disturbing and not good but that's okay. And the quality of living in the hostel is good. College infrastructure is not up to the mark .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A good pharmacy college in the Northeast region.

review_content.Placements: Cipla and Sun are the companies where most students want to go and work. Around 40% of students get internships at Lupin.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lab and classrooms are good and well maintained. They have a projector in every class. The lab contains all facilities required in a pharmacy college. The library is also there, with all books available, including all pharmacopeia. The lab contains all the equipment and journals that are needed.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are highly qualified and have experience in both practical and theory. Teachers are well educated. The lab assistants are also well trained and educated. They guide us properly in every topic, practical, and other extra activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure but dissatisfied with the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: So basically, NEF college is newly opened and we are the first batch of pharmacy courses. So there's been no placement facilities as of now. Although, there're opportunities outside the campus. In the current batch, we have 60 students for B.Pharma and 60 for D. Pharma.
review_content.Infrastructure: There's no hostel at our college. One can have PG nearby. So this college has a big, well-managed, and developed library and labs. The classrooms are spacious and well furnished, but there's no AC in the pharmacy department. The library is well developed for all the departments of our college. Labs are well-designed but underutilised because essential chemicals for practical purposes are frequently unavailable, which is a disadvantage of our college. There's no hostel facility in our college. Sports are organised annually. There's no good scope for cultural events or competitions here.
